title: Professional Development for Future-Ready Leadership
description:
Cultivate great leadership communication at work that evolves overtime with social practice artist and entrepreneur Musa Murchison!

There’s no one way to lead at work, and how you lead will transform over time, but there’s one thing for certain: As long as you lead with heart, a willingness to tell the truth, and authenticity, you are primed to be a fantastic leader. 

Join Musa as she walks us through her transformational leadership philosophy and how we can grow together toward a more diverse and equitable future through our life’s work. 

Together with Musa, you will learn:

* Alternative leadership scenarios that you should be prepared for 
* Skills for how you can smoothly transition through those alternative leadership scenarios 
* How to cultivate an environment for leadership diversity at your company and on your teams

Whether you’re an intern or a leader at your organization, if you care deeply about how your body of work is shaping and transforming the world then this class is for you.

Instructor bio:
Musa Murchison is an artist and cultural geographer who explores how work can be a path to both personal fulfillment and collective growth. Through art, media, and teaching, Musa helps people connect with their talents and use them with purpose.

For more than 15 years, Musa has created meaningful artwork, coached thousands of multipotentialites, and collaborated with leaders and practitioners worldwide. Alongside their creative practice, Musa also advises organizations on building more equitable and inclusive workplaces.

Musa’s courses are designed to help you approach work on your own terms, communicate with clarity, and confidently share your ideas.
